# Office Action 01 - Non-Final Rejection

> Captured Office Action for the demonstration matter (Self-Watering Planter Insert).
> The file-level ```oa block carries the header; each `### REJ## - ...` section carries a
> ```binding block. This is a fictional OA for the worked example - not a real USPTO paper.

```oa
mailing_date: 2026-03-02
examiner: "Pat Examiner (Art Unit 3754)"
application_no: "17/000,000"
action_type: non-final
```

## Detailed Action

Claims 1-2 are pending. Claim 1 stands rejected; claim 1 is additionally objected to as indefinite.

### REJ01 - 102(a)(1) anticipation of claim 1 over the wicking self-watering pot

Claim 1 is rejected under 35 U.S.C. 102(a)(1) as being anticipated by the wicking self-watering
pot reference (PA01).

```binding
ground: "102"
claims: [CLM01]
references: [PA01]
examiner_reasoning: >
  The reference discloses a self-watering planter with a basal water reservoir and a wick drawing
  water from the reservoir into the soil, and a sight window indicating fill level. The examiner
  asserts these features meet every limitation of claim 1.
```

### REJ02 - 112(b) indefiniteness of claim 1 ("selected level")

Claim 1 is rejected under 35 U.S.C. 112(b) as indefinite for the phrase "a selected level," which
the examiner asserts is a term of degree lacking an objective bound.

```binding
ground: "112b"
claims: [CLM01]
references: []
examiner_reasoning: >
  The phrase "rises to a selected level" is indefinite because the claim does not provide a standard
  for measuring the recited level, rendering the metes and bounds of the claim unclear.
```
